instruction: Fix parse_port(value) to accept an integer or a decimal string for ports 1 through 65535. Reject booleans, whitespace-padded strings, non-decimal strings, zero, and out-of-range values with ValueError.
acceptance_criteria: parse_port accepts valid integer and decimal string ports
parse_port raises ValueError for invalid types, formatting, and ranges

verifiers.name: valid-ports
verifiers.criterion: parse_port accepts valid integer and decimal string ports

verifiers.name: invalid-ports
verifiers.criterion: parse_port raises ValueError for invalid types, formatting, and ranges
